info.name: Attendance Management Module
info.description: Fully updated Postman collection structured into 12 folders representing 12 testing categories, each having exactly 10 test cases.

item.name: 1. Functional Testing
item.description: Core functional routes validation (Positive, Negative, and Boundary conditions).

item.name: TC-FUNC-01 (Positive): Mark PRESENT attendance successfully
TC-FUNC-02 (Positive): Mark ABSENT attendance successfully
TC-FUNC-03 (Positive): Mark LATE attendance successfully
TC-FUNC-04 (Positive): Update attendance status successfully by faculty
TC-FUNC-05 (Negative): Failure: Mark attendance with missing required fields

request.description: Ensure validation blocks empty body fields.

item.name: TC-FUNC-06 (Negative): Failure: Update non-existent attendance record ID

exec: pm.test("Status code is 400 or 500", function () { pm.expect([400, 500]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

request.description: Ensure update fails with invalid ID.

item.name: TC-FUNC-07 (Negative): Failure: Update attendance with invalid status string

request.description: Ensure update validation rejects bad status.

item.name: TC-FUNC-08 (Boundary): Mark attendance on exact current calendar date boundary
TC-FUNC-09 (Boundary): Mark attendance on a historic past date boundary
TC-FUNC-10 (Boundary): Retrieve students below exact 100 percent threshold boundary
2. API Testing
item.description: Core API parameter matching (Positive, Negative, and Boundary conditions).

item.name: TC-API-01 (Positive): Get overall attendance summary with valid filters
TC-API-02 (Positive): Query student attendance records with valid pagination
TC-API-03 (Positive): Query course records with limit validation
TC-API-04 (Positive): Calculate attendance percentage for a valid student
TC-API-05 (Negative): Failure: Query student records with invalid date format query

exec: pm.test("Status code is 400 or 500", function () { pm.expect([400, 500]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

item.name: TC-API-06 (Negative): Failure: Query percentage with missing query filters

exec: pm.test("Status code is 400 or 500", function () { pm.expect([400, 500]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

request.description: Ensure validation rejects empty percentage query.

item.name: TC-API-07 (Negative): Failure: Query threshold with negative percentage value

exec: pm.test("Status code is 400 or 500", function () { pm.expect([400, 500]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

item.name: TC-API-08 (Boundary): Query summary statistics with empty filter strings

request.description: Ensure empty query strings default cleanly.

item.name: TC-API-09 (Boundary): Failure: Mark attendance with future date boundary

request.description: Ensure future date boundary validation blocks insertion.

item.name: TC-API-10 (Boundary): Query student records with exact 0 offset pagination boundary
3. Security Testing
item.description: Security authorizations, RBAC, tenant checks (Positive, Negative, and Boundary conditions).

item.name: TC-SEC-01 (Positive): Faculty authorized to mark attendance successfully
TC-SEC-02 (Positive): Admin authorized to view overall summary successfully
TC-SEC-03 (Positive): Super Admin authorized to view summary metrics
TC-SEC-04 (Positive): Student authorized to view their own details successfully
TC-SEC-05 (Negative): Failure: Unauthenticated request blocks with 401
TC-SEC-06 (Negative): Failure: Student role unauthorized to mark attendance

request.description: Ensure student is blocked from marking.

item.name: TC-SEC-07 (Negative): Failure: Student unauthorized to view other student details

request.description: Verify IDOR blocks cross-student record queries.

item.name: TC-SEC-08 (Boundary): Failure: Tenant Isolation: Cross-university mark request rejected
TC-SEC-09 (Boundary): Failure: Invalid user role (GUEST) blocks access

request.description: Ensure GUEST role access is blocked.

item.name: TC-SEC-10 (Boundary): SQL Injection payload handling in path parameter

exec: pm.test("Status code is 200 or 400", function () { pm.expect([200, 400]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

request.description: Ensure SQL Injection strings are handled safely.

item.name: 4. Performance Testing
item.description: API latencies validation (Positive, Negative, and Boundary conditions).

item.name: TC-PERF-01 (Positive): Response time for Mark Attendance is < 1500ms

exec: pm.test("Response time is less than 1500ms", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(1500); });

item.name: TC-PERF-02 (Positive): Response time for Get summary is < 5000ms (Cold-start Tolerant)

exec: pm.test("Response time is less than 5000ms", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(5000); });

item.name: TC-PERF-03 (Positive): Response time for Student details query is < 5000ms (Cold-start Tolerant)

exec: pm.test("Response time is less than 5000ms", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(5000); });

request.description: Verify fast student details lookup latency.

item.name: TC-PERF-04 (Positive): Response time for Course records query is < 1500ms

exec: pm.test("Response time is less than 1500ms", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(1500); });

item.name: TC-PERF-05 (Negative): Measure latency on validation failure request (expected < 1500ms)

exec: pm.test("Response time is less than 1500ms", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(1500); });

item.name: TC-PERF-06 (Negative): Measure latency on unauthorized access block (expected < 1500ms)

exec: pm.test("Response time is less than 1500ms", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(1500); });

request.description: Ensure authorization failure payload returns fast.

item.name: TC-PERF-07 (Negative): Measure latency on non-existent record update (expected < 1500ms)

exec: pm.test("Status code is 400 or 500", function () { pm.expect([400, 500]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test("Response time is less than 1500ms", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(1500); });

request.description: Ensure non-existent update error payload returns fast.

item.name: TC-PERF-08 (Boundary): Latency under consecutive rapid summary reads (expected < 1500ms)

exec: pm.test("Response time is less than 1500ms", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(1500); });

request.description: Ensure consecutive reads do not degrade below 100ms.

item.name: TC-PERF-09 (Boundary): Latency for database reset operation (expected < 1500ms)

exec: pm.test("Response time is less than 1500ms", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(1500); });

item.name: TC-PERF-10 (Boundary): Latency for calculating percentage metric calculation (expected < 1500ms)

exec: pm.test("Response time is less than 1500ms", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(1500); });

item.name: 5. Vulnerability Testing
item.description: Protection against OWASP Top vulnerabilities (Positive, Negative, and Boundary conditions).

item.name: TC-VULN-01 (Positive): Update attendance reason containing standard safe comments
TC-VULN-02 (Positive): Query student details with normal alphanumeric string
TC-VULN-03 (Positive): Filter attendance using standard query date bounds
TC-VULN-04 (Positive): Retrieve summary with normal authorization tokens
TC-VULN-05 (Negative): Failure: JSON Injection attempt in Enum status field

request.description: Ensure validation blocks nested JSON objects for status.

item.name: TC-VULN-06 (Negative): Failure: Denial of Service oversized payload body check

exec: pm.test("Status code is 400 or 413", function () { pm.expect([400, 413]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

request.description: Ensure oversized inputs do not crash node processes.

item.name: TC-VULN-07 (Negative): Failure: Stored XSS script injection attempt in reason

exec: pm.test("Status code is 200 or 400 or 500", function () { pm.expect([200, 400, 500]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

request.description: Ensure HTML script tags are stored safely without execution.

item.name: TC-VULN-08 (Boundary): Path traversal query containment in student ID parameter

exec: pm.test("Status code is 404 or 400", function () { pm.expect([400, 404]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

request.description: Ensure directory traversal blocks return 400 or 404.

item.name: TC-VULN-09 (Boundary): SQL query injection block in date filters

exec: pm.test("Status code is 200 or 400", function () { pm.expect([200, 400]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

request.description: Ensure SQL query inject payloads are safely parsed without data structure compromise.

item.name: TC-VULN-10 (Boundary): HTTP Parameter Pollution (HPP) handling for duplicate keys

request.description: Verify multiple duplicate query fields don't cause crash.

item.name: 6. Compatibility Testing
item.description: Format variations, Content-Type, casing, and preflights (Positive, Negative, and Boundary conditions).

item.name: TC-COMP-01 (Positive): Mark attendance with standard JSON content type

request.description: Verify standard JSON post body succeeds.

item.name: TC-COMP-02 (Positive): Gzip compression accept header compatibility

request.description: Ensure accept compression handles request safely.

item.name: TC-COMP-03 (Positive): Modern Web Browser User-Agent header compatibility
TC-COMP-04 (Positive): Case-insensitivity support for status parameter
TC-COMP-05 (Negative): Failure: Rejection of XML payload format
TC-COMP-06 (Negative): Failure: Rejection of HTML payload format
TC-COMP-07 (Negative): Failure: Rejection of URL-encoded form format

exec: pm.test("Status code is 400 or 500", function () { pm.expect([400, 500]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

item.name: TC-COMP-08 (Boundary): CORS preflight origin check compatibility
TC-COMP-09 (Boundary): Persistent keep-alive TCP connection simulation check
TC-COMP-10 (Boundary): Failure: Rejection of multipart form data body
7. Database Testing
item.description: Database queries, state persistence checks, audit logs (Positive, Negative, and Boundary conditions).

item.name: TC-DB-01 (Positive): Mark attendance records and verify DB state save

request.description: Verify data records exist inside DB.

item.name: TC-DB-02 (Positive): Update status field and verify value persistence in DB

request.description: Verify status variable updates in DB.

item.name: TC-DB-03 (Positive): Verify DB audit trail records created for updates

request.description: Verify audit logging persists updates successfully.

item.name: TC-DB-04 (Positive): Query summary count using valid database aggregations
TC-DB-05 (Negative): Failure: Query student details using non-numeric offset limit parameter

request.description: Ensure non-numeric offset query returns 400 Bad Request.

item.name: TC-DB-06 (Negative): Failure: Query student details using non-numeric page limit parameter

request.description: Ensure non-numeric limit query returns 400 Bad Request.

item.name: TC-DB-07 (Negative): Failure: Query database for non-existent course ID (Returns empty rows)

request.description: Verify query database returns 400 Bad Request for invalid course.

item.name: TC-DB-08 (Boundary): Query database matching past date boundaries (Returns empty rows)

request.description: Ensure out-of-bounds dates query succeeds returning empty array.

item.name: TC-DB-09 (Boundary): Database reset tables verification checks
TC-DB-10 (Boundary): Query database for non-existent batch ID (Returns empty rows)

request.description: Verify query database returns empty batch rows safely.

item.name: 8. Regression Testing
item.description: Defect validation check, future dates, RBAC, duplicate prevention (Positive, Negative, and Boundary conditions).

item.name: TC-REGR-01 (Positive): Default date assignment when date is omitted in POST mark body

request.description: Verify bug fix: Date is defaulted in backend service when omitted.

item.name: TC-REGR-02 (Positive): Only Faculty or Admin can fetch threshold breach data

request.description: Verify threshold access works for faculty.

item.name: TC-REGR-03 (Positive): Percentage API returns 0 when no history exists for student

request.description: Ensure percentage calculation handles empty history.

item.name: TC-REGR-04 (Positive): Valid update to reason with trailing spaces is trimmed
TC-REGR-05 (Negative): Failure: Re-verify future date attendance marking is strictly blocked

request.description: Verify bug fix: Future dates are blocked with 400.

item.name: TC-REGR-06 (Negative): Failure: Re-verify Student role cannot mark attendance

request.description: Verify bug fix: Students cannot mark attendance.

item.name: TC-REGR-07 (Negative): Failure: Re-verify Student role cannot view other student details

request.description: Verify bug fix: Students cannot view other student records.

item.name: TC-REGR-08 (Boundary): Failure: Duplicate marking blocks double entries on same schedule

exec: pm.test("Duplicate error message check", function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData.message).to.include("already exists"); });

request.description: Ensure duplicate attendance logs are blocked.

item.name: TC-REGR-09 (Boundary): Negative limit pagination parameter defaults safely

request.description: Ensure negative pagination limit defaults gracefully.

item.name: TC-REGR-10 (Boundary): Negative offset pagination parameter defaults safely

request.description: Ensure negative pagination offset defaults gracefully.

item.name: 9. Data Validation Testing
item.description: Datatypes formats validation (Positive, Negative, and Boundary conditions).

item.name: TC-VAL-01 (Positive): Valid inputs mapping schema validation

request.description: Verify valid inputs mapping schema works.

item.name: TC-VAL-02 (Positive): Lowercase status converted/validated successfully
TC-VAL-03 (Positive): Extraneous fields ignored safely in POST mark body

request.description: Verify system parses payloads containing extra parameters safely.

item.name: TC-VAL-04 (Positive): Extremely long correction reason updates successfully

request.description: Verify extremely long text updates succeed.

item.name: TC-VAL-05 (Negative): Failure: Empty request body to POST mark endpoint

request.description: Ensure empty body returns 400 Bad Request.

item.name: TC-VAL-06 (Negative): Failure: Empty reason correction update rejected

exec: pm.test("Status code is 400 or 500", function () { pm.expect([400, 500]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

item.name: TC-VAL-07 (Negative): Failure: Numeric datatype passed for student ID string

request.description: Ensure numeric student ID yields validation failure.

item.name: TC-VAL-08 (Boundary): Failure: Malformed UUID path parameter validation

exec: pm.test("Status code is 400 or 500", function () { pm.expect([400, 500]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

request.description: Ensure malformed ID path variable returns error.

item.name: TC-VAL-09 (Boundary): Failure: Non-numeric query threshold value validation
TC-VAL-10 (Boundary): Failure: Malformed Date string parameter validation

exec: pm.test("Status code is 400 or 500", function () { pm.expect([400, 500]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

request.description: Ensure malformed date string is rejected.

item.name: 10. AI/ML Prompt Validation Testing (if applicable)
item.description: LLM formatted payloads handling (Positive, Negative, and Boundary conditions).

item.name: TC-AI-01 (Positive): Parse conversational ISO date time format strings successfully
TC-AI-02 (Positive): Parse shorthand query filters from AI Copilots successfully

request.description: Verify AI partial query parses correctly.

item.name: TC-AI-03 (Positive): AI client generated tracing UUID header parsing successfully

request.description: Verify request ID trace passed cleanly.

item.name: TC-AI-04 (Positive): Complex nested AI metadata ignored safely in body

request.description: Verify nested model metadata fields ignored safely.

item.name: TC-AI-05 (Negative): Failure: Trailing comma malformed JSON payload handling

request.description: Ensure trailing commas (malformed JSON) return 400 Bad Request.

item.name: TC-AI-06 (Negative): Failure: Invalid prompt injection payload in reason string

request.description: Ensure prompt injection is rejected with 400 Bad Request.

item.name: TC-AI-07 (Negative): Failure: Malformed conversational date string rejection

exec: pm.test("Status code is 400 or 500", function () { pm.expect([400, 500]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

item.name: TC-AI-08 (Boundary): Shorthand percentage parameters query mapping validation
TC-AI-09 (Boundary): AI agent User-Agent scope validation check
TC-AI-10 (Boundary): Consistent formatting schema checks
11. Cloud Testing
item.description: Cloud gateways variables (Positive, Negative, and Boundary conditions).

item.name: TC-CLOUD-01 (Positive): Heartbeat server health check verification
TC-CLOUD-02 (Positive): API Gateway forwarded IP header parsing check
TC-CLOUD-03 (Positive): Cloud trace ID AWS/GCP header pass-through validation
TC-CLOUD-04 (Positive): API Gateway consecutive rapid requests rate limit check
TC-CLOUD-05 (Negative): Failure: Rejection of mismatched host headers
TC-CLOUD-06 (Negative): Failure: Load Balancer timeout mock simulation
TC-CLOUD-07 (Negative): Failure: Public client connection termination simulation
TC-CLOUD-08 (Boundary): Cloud storage resources download headers validation
TC-CLOUD-09 (Boundary): API versioning routing headers compatibility (Accept v1)
TC-CLOUD-10 (Boundary): Response HTTP Cloud headers completeness check
12. Usability Testing
item.description: API usability descriptions validation (Positive, Negative, and Boundary conditions).

item.name: TC-USE-01 (Positive): Success boolean indicator property in summaries

exec: pm.test("success key check", function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData).to.have.property("success"); });

request.description: Ensure success property in output data.

item.name: TC-USE-02 (Positive): camelCase properties formatting consistency in student details

exec: pm.test("camelCase keys check", function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); if (jsonData.data.length > 0) { pm.expect(jsonData.data[0]).to.have.property("studentId"); } });

item.name: TC-USE-03 (Positive): Standard ISO date format usability check
TC-USE-04 (Positive): Database reset clear success message feedback

exec: pm.test("Clear reset message check", function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData.message).to.include("successfully"); });

request.description: Verify clear db reset descriptive message.

item.name: TC-USE-05 (Negative): Failure: Descriptive error message for missing student ID

exec: pm.test("Missing studentId description present", function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData.message).to.include("studentId"); });

item.name: TC-USE-06 (Negative): Failure: Descriptive error message for missing schedule ID

exec: pm.test("Missing scheduleId description present", function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData.message).to.include("scheduleId"); });

item.name: TC-USE-07 (Negative): Failure: Descriptive error message for duplicate marking validation

exec: pm.test("Duplicate error message check", function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData.message).to.include("already exists"); });

request.description: Ensure duplicate marking returns clear usability warning.

item.name: TC-USE-08 (Boundary): Descriptive 404 Route Not Found usability feedback
TC-USE-09 (Boundary): Descriptive 404 resource child error details usability feedback
TC-USE-10 (Boundary): Consistent usability error schemas structure check

exec: pm.test("Error schema format validation check", function () { pm.expect([400, 404, 500]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
